subcodes.title: Words to Eric Julihn, spoken on 1913-01-22
subcodes.first_line: We were in San Francisco less than a month.... The friends of God must sacrifice their lives for the sake of each other.
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
